Metadata.title: The Nice Picnic — Exclusive & unique picnics on the French Riviera
Metadata.description: Turnkey picnics in Nice and the French Riviera. Exclusive packages with local produce, secret spots and unforgettable romantic experiences.
Metadata.keywords: Nice picnic, French Riviera picnic, romantic picnic Nice, unique experience Nice, floating picnic, Niçoise aperitif
Metadata.ogTitle: The Nice Picnic — Exclusive picnics on the French Riviera
Metadata.ogDescription: Turnkey experiences: Niçoise flavours, secret spots, memories that last.

Footer.tagline: Exclusive & unique picnics on the French Riviera.

items.a: Book online and pay by card. We set everything up at an exclusive spot before you arrive — Medium, Premium, Wellness or Floating. All you have to do is enjoy.
We systematically offer to reschedule if the weather is unsuitable. Cancellations: 100% refunded more than 7 days in advance, 50% between 3 and 7 days, 0% less than 48 hours before.

items.q: How long does the experience last?
items.a: Medium: 1h30 on site · Premium: 2 hours on site · Wellness Picnic: 2 hours (1h yoga + 1h healthy brunch) · Floating Picnic: 1h30 on the water.

items.q: How many people is it for?
items.a: Our packages are designed for 2 people (couples). Floating Picnic: strictly 2 guests maximum. For groups of friends, contact us for custom options.

hero.imgAlt: Elegant picnic on the French Riviera — Nice, France
hero.titleRich: Exclusive picnics & out of the ordinary
hero.lead: Turnkey experiences on the French Riviera. Local produce, secret spots, unforgettable memories. You show up — we take care of everything.

concept.desc: Exclusive, one-of-a-kind picnics made with produce from Niçoise artisans, in the most beautiful secret spots on the French Riviera.
concept.step1Text: Choose your package and menu. Secure payment via Stripe, instant confirmation.
concept.step2Text: Medium, Premium, Wellness or Floating: we set everything up at your spot before you arrive.
concept.step3Text: Savour the moment, print your keepsakes, and leave with stars in your eyes.

editorial1.imgAlt: Local Niçoise produce — French Riviera artisan food
editorial1.desc: Pan bagnat, socca, pissaladière, stuffed vegetables, olive fougasse, Swiss chard tart… Every menu celebrates the authentic flavours of Nice and Provence.

gallery.desc: Bohemian setups, Niçoise apéritifs, intimate moments and Riviera sunsets — our own photos, not stock imagery.

testimonials.titleRich: They say it better than we do…
testimonials.desc: Live Google reviews and video testimonials from our guests on the French Riviera.

googleReviews.empty: No Google reviews yet — be the first!

packages.desc: From a bohemian picnic set up for you to wellness and on-the-water experiences — choose your formula.

medium.name: Medium
items: A bohemian, carefully styled picnic setup
Rugs, cushions, jute garland and dreamcatcher
Niçoise apéritif: pissaladière, pichade, pan bagnat, stuffed vegetables, barbajuans, coca frita, tapenade and cherry tomatoes
Drinks: still water, sparkling water and rosé for two
Bluetooth speaker provided
Full set-up and take-down included
On-site duration: 1h30
medium.foot: All inclusive — you arrive, you enjoy

prestige.name: Premium
items: Everything in Medium, more refined and generous
Richer styling for a true wow effect
Moroccan-style lamps for a warm, intimate mood
Small canvas with brushes for a creative touch
Compact photo printer with paper for keepsakes
Full set-up and take-down included
On-site duration: 2 hours

wellness.name: Wellness Picnic
items: A 2-hour outdoor wellness break
1 hour of yoga to relax and recentre
1 hour of healthy mini brunch — simple, fresh and indulgent
Mats provided
Light selection: fresh juice, iced tea, almonds and granola
A moment of calm, balance and disconnection

floating.name: Floating Picnic
floating.imgAlt: Couple enjoying a floating picnic in a French Riviera cove
items: Inflatable craft set up for a picnic — 2 guests maximum
Anchored ~30 m from shore in an unusual setting
Warm bohemian styling suited to the sea
Same apéritif as Medium with Niçoise specialities and drinks
Ladder, masks, snorkels, life jackets, hats, sunscreen, towels
Bluetooth speaker and playing cards
Photos taken during the experience, delivered on return
Waterproof bags and phone pouches
Duration: 1h30

menus.desc: 100% local products selected from artisans on the French Riviera.
menus.brunchText: Pastries, artisan bread, fig jam, local honey, fresh fruit, boiled eggs, charcuterie, fresh goat cheese, cherry tomatoes. Thermos coffee + orange juice.
menus.dejeunerText: Pissaladière, socca chips, pan bagnat, Niçoise stuffed veg, salade niçoise, olive fougasse, sweet Swiss chard tart. Authenticity in the basket.
menus.aperoText: Charcuterie, cheeses, tapenade, AOP Nice olives, pissaladière, fougasse, socca chips, artisan bread, mesclun, AOC olive oil.
menus.drinksNote: Drinks included: Côtes de Provence (red, rosé or white), homemade lemonade, water. Optional upgrade Bellet AOC wine +€20

bento.imgAlt: Rosé toast and Niçoise apéritif board — The Nice Picnic experience
bento.b1p: Photo printer included in the Premium package. Take home instant keepsakes.
bento.b2p: Reconnect. Playful questions to rediscover each other between bites.
bento.b3p: Bluetooth speaker + QR code to a curated Spotify playlist for every mood.
bento.b4p: LED strings, candles, lanterns, cushions… Every detail designed for emotion.
bento.b5p: Niçoise artisans, seasonal produce, reusable tableware. Zero plastic, zero waste.

pricing.footnote: 100% online payment. Optional Bellet AOC wine upgrade +€20.

editorialFloating.imgAlt: Floating Picnic at sunset facing Nice — on-the-water picnic experience
editorialFloating.desc: An inflatable craft set up for two, anchored just off the shore. Niçoise apéritif, bohemian styling and stunning views over the Bay of Angels — a one-of-a-kind experience for couples.

editorialPrestige.imgAlt: Premium apéritif board by the sea — The Nice Picnic Premium experience
editorialPrestige.desc: Proposal, anniversary, romantic surprise… Refined styling, Moroccan lamps, photo printer and a creative touch. A memory etched forever.

gift.desc: Give an unforgettable experience. Valid for 6 months.

cta.lead: Book in 2 minutes. 100% online. Secure payment.
